strategy: Contract-pipeline plan (15 disjoint module nodes) implemented in isolated worktrees; per-node isolated verify deadlocked (source nodes vs separate test nodes + whole-suite verify), so finalized via COMBINED RECONCILIATION (operator-chosen): each node committed, all commits cherry-picked onto one integration branch, full suite run once on the union.

nodes.summary: input_conflict prompt names remediation-outcomes.json; lens/severity prose + provider accessor single-sourced; behavior-preserving extraction of final-gate cluster to finalGate.ts with equivalence test.

INFRA_FILE_PATHS replaced with src/remediate/-derived matcher (win32-normalized) so isInfraModifyingBlock is live again (HIGH); invalid result files archived not swallowed; pool-construction preamble single-sourced.

ungrounded extracted-plan marker removed on citation-grounding failure (HIGH security); archive originalFree honored; DAG edge referential validation; lean-verdict schema_version; phase-list single-sourced; resolveAdversarialDepth extracted. 2 of 7 sub-claims rejected as not-a-bug (document validator never existed; moduleSlug already single-sourced).
fullyGreen now means genuinely-completed close; skipped non-none merge-to-base no longer deletes artifacts (HIGH); none/no-op green path preserved.

roster pool hostModel derived from poolKey at the single construction seam (HIGH model-routing) — all dispatch drivers correct-by-construction; fileLock injectable clock seam added (STALE_LOCK_MS unchanged).

self-spawn-blocked providers carry a machine-readable flag and are excluded from the confirmed pool by default; commandExists/self-spawn/PATH guard single-sourced (new providerPathGuard.ts) with injectable detection hook; provider_done telemetry vocab added.
sanitizeRunId replaced with injective _xx byte-escape encoding so distinct runIds map to distinct friction paths (collision fixed); import surface + idempotent capture preserved.

flag mutual-exclusion validated BEFORE destructive cleanupStaleArtifactsDir (HIGH); batch ingest admits only canonical result filenames; validate-result grounds against configured repo_root not cwd; line-count failure policy single-sourced.

App Router empty-segment route normalized to '/' so app/route.ts yields root route; HTML_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTE single-sourced (exported from analyzers/html.ts, duplicate deleted from browserExtension.ts) with drift guard.

auto-fix formatters scoped to eligible disposition files not '.' (write-scope); win32 shim basename classification; strategy_summary gated on AUDIT_CODE_VERBOSE; 3 dead taskBuilder functions deleted. rekeyDriftedResults guard already present.

worker line-range end>=start refinement (schema regenerated, drift-guarded); discovered-limit field set single-sourced incl. context_tokens/output_tokens. Secondary ungrounded sub-claims (permission-bypass surfacing, normalizer drops, coverage lookup, DesignAssessment) left per verify-before-fix.

update-languages.mjs target path fixed to repo src/audit/extractors; CI path filters include package.json + workflow; audit postinstall exits non-zero on missing required asset; knip dead-code gate single-sourced. 2 claims rejected (smoke already captures one response; opencode MCP calls not actually removed).
stale packages/remediate-code/ fixtures re-pinned to src/remediate/; version literals -> exported constants; source-text drift sentinels -> type-level/exported-surface assertions.
fragile npx-madge guard replaced with in-process cycle detector; magic-11 -> LENSES.length; recursive single-decl walk -> import LENS_KEYWORD_MAP/VALID_LENSES; STALE_LOCK_MS imported not scraped.
fileLock tests driven via injected clock seam; copied threshold literals -> imported STALE_LOCK_MS; shared fileLock test-support module; obligation-engine imports source not dist.

reconciliation_fixes: tests/audit/audit-dispatch-observability.test.mjs — set AUDIT_CODE_VERBOSE so the now-gated strategy_summary line emits.
tests/audit/audit-code-completion.test.mjs — batch fixture renamed to canonical <stem>_<12hex>.json so node-8's stricter filter admits it.
notes: Several findings were adversarially verified false at implementation (workers applied verify-before-fix): document-vs-implement validator, already-single-sourced moduleSlug, opencode MCP-removal, and a cluster of ungrounded audit-contracts sub-claims — these are recorded as verified-already-correct, not silently dropped.
